list: SELECT id, name, value, description, updated_at FROM settings ORDER BY name
updateById: UPDATE settings SET name = ?1, value = ?2, description = ?3, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?4
updateByIdKeepValue: UPDATE settings SET name = ?1, description = ?2, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?3
upsertByName: INSERT INTO settings (id, name, value, description) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4) ON CONFLICT(name) DO UPDATE SET value = excluded.value, description = excluded.description, updated_at = datetime('now')
insertAuthor: INSERT INTO settings_authors (id, id_setting, author) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3)
